title: Change status of an item, when date is changed
excerpt:
Dear all, 
a very simple thing I didn’t find an answer for: 
When I change a date to a new date, a corresponding status 
item should be changed from e.g. “done” into “not done”. 
Thanks for your help!

posts.author: TimoWildenhain (Timo Wildenhain)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear all,
a very simple thing I didn’t find an answer for:

When I change a date to a new date, a corresponding status
item should be changed from e.g. “done” into “not done”.

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@TimoWildenhain,

Use a custom automation…

posts.author: TimoWildenhain (Timo Wildenhain)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JCorrell

Hello Jim, it seems like I cannot select “When DUE DATE” but only “When date arrives” and “When date has passed” in the automation center. Any idea? Thank you!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@TimoWildenhain,

You have to use CUSTOM automations. Then select “When”, then “column changes”…

You should be good from there. If not, let me know.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
